overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through rain-soaked neon-lit Night City streets. The player navigates through urban intersections, elevated highways, and narrow industrial alleys while heavy rain creates reflective wet surfaces and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet residential street with neon street lighting

events.description: white van crosses the road from right to left in front of the vehicle
rapid acceleration from low speed to high speed (96 km/h)

agents.ego_description: navigating wet city streets, slowing for intersection then accelerating sharply through the rain

low-rise residential structures with lit windows

tall street lamps casting teal and orange light

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked residential district at night, the vehicle slows as a white van crosses the intersection, then accelerates sharply. Neon street lights reflect off the wet asphalt while utility poles and low-rise buildings line the streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with large digital billboards

events.description: sharp left turn onto a different street
slowing down for intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: making winding turns through wet streets, observing illuminated billboards and neon signs

entered.detail: illuminated advertising billboard with rotating displays

segments.scene_description: Navigating winding urban streets with frequent turns, passing large digital billboards and neon-lit commercial buildings. The vehicle slows for intersections while rain continues to fall on the reflective asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station intersection with commercial plaza

events.description: passing illuminated gas station with bright signage on the right

agents.ego_description: turning right at the gas station intersection and accelerating down the street

suspended traffic signals showing red and green lights

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at an intersection featuring a brightly lit gas station, then accelerates through the wet streets. Traffic lights hang overhead while commercial buildings line the road.

exiting the highway and slowing for street level turn

agents.ego_description: following a red car on the elevated highway then exiting to street level

concrete safety barriers lining the elevated roadway

segments.scene_description: Following a red vehicle onto an elevated highway with concrete barriers and overpasses, then exiting back to street level. Industrial warehouses appear in the distance while the road stretches ahead through the rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alley with graffiti-covered walls

making sharp turn in confined alleyway

agents.ego_description: navigating tight turns through narrow industrial alleys with graffiti walls

close concrete walls creating a confined corridor

segments.scene_description: Navigating through narrow industrial alleys with graffiti-covered concrete walls closing in on both sides. The vehicle makes sharp turns through the confined space, leaving the highway behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked urban landscape that shifts from neon-lit residential streets to confined industrial alleys. It begins by navigating a residential district where the vehicle slows for a crossing van before accelerating past utility poles and reflective asphalt. As the camera winds through commercial zones, the scenery expands with large digital billboards and brightly lit gas stations before turning toward an elevated highway. The perspective then follows a red vehicle across concrete overpasses, momentarily opening the view toward distant warehouses before descending back to street level. Finally, the open road narrows sharply as the vehicle dives into tight industrial alleys defined by graffiti-covered concrete walls.
